claim_boundary: Technical Node1 Stage-A failure evidence only. No scientific method was evaluated; no training occurred; no model-quality, enrichment, binding, blocking, Kd, Docking Gold, Top7500, or promotion claim is supported.

decision.required_recovery_version: V1.3.2 or later, with a new package path, new preregistration/supersession record, new implementation freeze, and new independent Stage-A approval

minimal_recovery_boundary.allowed_change: repair Python 3.11-compatible legacy test invocation only, while preserving exact 13 test source hashes and intended 102-test count
required_real_node1_evidence: Python 3.11 exact legacy suite collects and passes 102 tests
combined total test count is frozen
fresh Stage-A runs exactly five materializations and five load-only validations

observations.failing_phase: first legacy test invocation before V1.3.1 tests and before materialization
observations.root_cause: legacy launcher passed absolute filesystem test paths to python -m unittest; Node1 Python 3.11 treated them as import module names and failed before collecting the intended 102 tests
